name: Hepatitis A Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for hepatitis A vaccines. Used in childhood immunization (CIS) measures. Requires 2 doses with first dose at 12-23 months and second dose 6-18 months later.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
